meta.title: Konrad Thiemann · Software Engineer
meta.description: Software engineer focused on frontend. I build considered, lean and documented solutions – in production e-commerce and my own projects, with AI as a deliberately built tool.

hero.tagline: A software engineer who builds deliberately.
hero.intro: I build things that make people's lives easier – and in a way a team can build on: considered, lean, documented. I use frameworks and AI as a deliberate choice, not out of habit.

items.title: I question before I build.
items.desc: Before adopting a solution, I check whether it really fits the problem. That's how I came to shape 100+ UI building blocks of an in-house library that replaces a third-party framework – leaner and faster.

items.title: I build purpose-fit, not bloated.
items.desc: Lean, targeted solutions over universal heavyweights: fewer dependencies, clearer responsibilities, better performance.

items.title: Quality is built in – and lived.
items.desc: Automated quality gates (lint → typecheck → test → build) and traceable commits – so a team can keep building fast and safely.

items.title: I enable others.
items.desc: Apprentice, intern or team – I share knowledge instead of hoarding it. Including how to use AI sensibly in everyday development.

experience.title: What I own at work
experience.lead: For over 2.5 years I've worked on the frontend of a multi-brand e-commerce system. I look after not just the shop but the system around it – across eight subsystems. I think *in connections*, not isolated tasks.
items: Helped build a custom UI library that replaces a third-party framework
API layer, shared libraries & drop-in packages
Technical SEO: automated sitemaps, meta data & Google Discover optimisation
Noticeably faster load times through targeted performance work
experience.educationDesc: Intensive web developer training focused on modern frontend development.

items.text: His keen grasp of new topics, above-average commitment and strong willingness to learn – combined with excellent communication skills and the ability to think critically – set him apart.
He carries out all tasks entirely independently, with great care and thorough planning. He always acts calmly, thoughtfully, with focus and the utmost precision.
Konrad is an exceptional career changer, whose ability to learn and grow quickly impressed me deeply.
The decision to hire Konrad was one of the best I have ever made, and I would make it again without hesitation.
I can recommend Konrad without reservation to any team or company that values committed, fast learners and authentic personalities.

ai.title: AI – deliberately built
ai.body: I don't reach for AI at random – I deliberately define how it works: a system of specialised AI agents with clearly documented workflows. At work and in my own projects I steer the AI tooling through dedicated configuration files.
ai.note: AI with *high leverage*, not blind trust.

tech.title: Tech stack
tech.note: Tools and technologies I work with every day.

projects.title: What I build
projects.note: Personal projects – for learning, experimenting and the joy of building.

doewe.name: Doewe
doewe.detail: A platform for logging expenses, setting budgets and tracking financial goals. Full-stack with Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma and PostgreSQL – strictly typed, with CI and tests.

pokemeta.name: Pokémon Meta Tracker
pokemeta.tagline: Track games, understand the meta, improve decks.
pokemeta.detail: An app for tracking card games, with an overview of the current meta and suggestions to improve your deck.

waldbingo.name: Waldbingo
waldbingo.detail: Family bingo with cards generated based on AI, weather and location – motivation to head outside and explore your surroundings.

teaching.title: Sharing knowledge
teaching.lead: What I know, *I pass on* – within the team and beyond.
items: Taught our apprentice how to code
Ran internal trainings on programming with AI

about.title: About me
about.body: *Software engineer* – currently working mainly in frontend, but not defined by it. I build software that makes people's lives easier, and I keep mature e-commerce systems running and evolving. I deliberately invest in good tools – including the way I use AI.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Fancy a chat? Drop me a line directly – I'll get back to you soon.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! Your message is on its way – I'll be in touch soon.
contact.error: That didn't work, unfortunately. Please try again later or reach me on LinkedIn.
